nasb.text: Jesus said to him, “You have both seen Him, and He is the one who is talking with you.”

esv.text: Jesus said to him, “You have seen him, and it is he who is speaking to you.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“你已經見過他，現在跟你說話的就是他。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“你已经看见祂了，现在跟你说话的就是祂。”

csbs.text: 耶稣说：“你已经看到他了，现在与你说话的，就是那一位。”
